transcript.text: Namaste ji, clinic ka phone aaya hai. Aapka kya hai, sir/madam?
Kripya aapka naam bataiye, sir/madam? - (Please tell me your name, sir/madam?)
Koi khed hai? (Is there anything wrong?)
Aapki phone number kya hai? (What is your phone number?)

transcript_text: Namaste ji, clinic ka phone aaya hai. Aapka kya hai, sir/madam? Hello. Kripya aapka naam bataiye, sir/madam? - (Please tell me your name, sir/madam?) Thank you. Koi khed hai? (Is there anything wrong?) Okay. Aapki phone number kya hai? (What is your phone number?)

intake.notes: Patient call initiated, awaiting patient details
